settings.input_contract: For each (n, budget), fixed-mask baselines receive identical observed_tensor (missing entries zeroed, observed entries in relative meV from observed minimum) and identical boolean mask.
settings.metric_contract: Completion rows use faithful.evaluate_completed_tensor_on_test plus exact-grid evaluate_completed_tensor_on_grid/evaluate_completion_metrics_dual_style when enabled.
